betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Wireless Pattern Terminal§f

§aEncode patterns from anywhere.§f

The §bWireless Pattern Terminal§f combines wireless access with pattern encoding. Encode crafting and processing patterns from anywhere.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e0§f (wireless)
§b•§f Function: pattern encoding (crafting + processing)
§b•§f Range: depends on Wireless Boosters

§6How It Works§f:
Functions identically to the §bME Pattern Terminal§f but wirelessly. Encode patterns and put them into the network's pattern providers.

§6Crafting Recipe§f:
§b•§f §b1× Wireless Terminal§f
§b•§f §b1× ME Pattern Terminal§f
§b•§f §b1× Logic Processor§f

§6Strategic Role§f:
The §bWireless Pattern Terminal§f is essential for §9remote pattern setup§f. When you set up a new production line at an outpost, you can encode patterns from the outpost without returning to your main base.

§6Use Cases§f:
§b•§f Setting up patterns at remote outposts
§b•§f Encoding processing patterns for fluid interfaces
§b•§f Configuring complex multi-step crafting patterns on-the-fly
§b•§f Debugging pattern issues from the production site

§eTip§f: Pair with a §bWireless Crafting Terminal§f for full remote pattern + crafting capability.
